description: When you have the desire to hang out in style, step into these Lucia sandals from buckaroo, and you'll easily be the most stylish person at the gathering! The thickly cushioned footbed will make you feel like you're literally walking on clouds all day. You might not want to take them off even when you get home! Pair them with jeans, shorts or cargos for a fabulous casual look. Upper Full grain leather straps for added durability and style Over-the-foot straps with Velcro fastener for better structure and comfort Back strap with a Velcro fastener on the front for a more snug, customised Fit Mesh panels on the sides of the forefoot and back strap for better breathability Leather overlays on the sides for better structure and style Contrast stitch detailing for added attraction Branding on the front of the ankle strap Midsole EVA midsole with shock absorbers for lightweight comfort Very well-cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Fabric lining for extra comfort Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant, very flexible rubber outsole for better shock absorption Horizantal grooves all over the outsole for better grip shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shine Do not store in direct sunlight
